summary: Iteration 3 testing covered ReplyDesk rename, sentiment-override toggle-like endpoint, async Groq-based detect_sentiment, plus full regression of tone presets, auto_liked/sentiment fields, and existing CRUD. 24/24 backend pytest cases pass; all critical frontend flows (title, footer, LIKED↔NOT LIKED toggle, tone selector, edit/cancel, thread toggle, skip) verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: detect_sentiment is now async and hits Groq per fetched comment; without GROQ_API_KEY the fallback correctly returns 'positive'. With a key every new comment will incur 1 extra LLM call — consider batching or caching identical texts if fetch frequency grows.

detect_sentiment fallback-on-exception returns 'positive' (line 82 of groq_service.py). On Groq outages, users may see every comment auto-liked silently. Consider returning 'neutral' + logging a visible warning so the UI can surface a degraded-mode indicator.
toggle-like endpoint has no rate limiting and no auth — acceptable for demo scope, but double-clicks could race. Current implementation is atomic via find+update so impact is minimal.
Sidebar.jsx nests tone-preset row inside the clickable account div (pre-existing from iteration 2, not a regression).
Good: proper async/await, _id excluded via projection, env vars used correctly, new data-testids (auto-liked-badge / not-liked-badge) are consistent and clickable.
seed_data_creation: Idempotent POST /api/seed-demo confirmed. 4 demo accounts + 8 demo comments (all auto_liked=true, sentiment=positive).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests: /app/backend/tests/test_comments_api.py (core CRUD + ReplyDesk root) and test_new_features.py (tone, auto_liked/sentiment, NEW toggle-like, async detect_sentiment). Run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. test_new_features.py was updated: removed the deprecated NEGATIVE_KEYWORDS import (keyword-based sentiment was replaced by Groq) and added TestToggleLike + async detect_sentiment assertion. Key test IDs: auto-liked-badge (green, clickable), not-liked-badge (gray, clickable), app-title, sidebar, tone-selector-{id}, tone-option-{value}-{id}. Footer 'REPLYDESK' uses CSS text-transform: uppercase; use innerText (not textContent) or case-insensitive match.
verified_features: POST /api/comments/{id}/toggle-like flips auto_liked boolean; returns {success, auto_liked}; persists to DB
detect_sentiment is async (inspect.iscoroutinefunction=True) and returns one of positive/neutral/negative
PUT /api/accounts/{id}/tone accepts all 4 presets, rejects invalid (400), 404 for missing account
GET /api/comments returns auto_liked + sentiment fields (bool + enum)
All 8 demo comments seeded with auto_liked=true + sentiment=positive
Regression: approve, skip, edit-draft, regenerate, approve-all, account filter, seed idempotency, 404 handling — all pass
Sidebar header renders 'ReplyDesk'; footer renders 'REPLYDESK' (uppercased brand)
LIKED badge (auto-liked-badge) is clickable and toggles to NOT LIKED (not-liked-badge) via /toggle-like; second click toggles back
Tone dropdown, edit/cancel draft, thread show/hide, skip button all still functional
